sector_specific_levers.lever_name: OTA Commission Reduction (Direct Booking Channel Mix Shift)
condition_precedents: OTA channel mix analysed — commission rate by OTA and booking type quantified
Direct booking capability enhanced (website UX, loyalty programme, rate parity enforcement)
Revenue management strategy updated: direct-channel rate advantage validated
industry_sources: Ministry of Tourism India — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — OTA distribution channel mix benchmarks
FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — OTA commission rates and direct booking benchmarks India 12-25%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit channel mix: map room-night volume and commission cost by OTA channel (Booking.com, Expedia, MakeMyTrip) vs direct (website, walk-in, corporate)
Design direct booking incentive program: rate parity management, loyalty rate advantage, and value-add (F&B credit, upgrade) for direct bookers
Negotiate OTA commission rates by market segment; explore OTA preferred-partner programs that reduce commission for volume commitments
Track OTA commission as % of room revenue, direct booking share, and RevPAR by channel monthly

diagnostic_signals.signal: OTA channel contributing >40% of room revenue with average commission >18% of room rate
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Direct booking shift will materially reduce distribution cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Direct booking share declining YoY while OTA acquisition cost growing faster than RevPAR
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Channel rebalancing is strategically and financially necessary

diagnostic_signals.signal: Customer loyalty program contribution to direct bookings <15% of eligible members
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Loyalty program activation can drive higher-value direct bookings

required_data_fields: Room revenue and commission cost by channel (OTA, direct, corporate, GDS)
Commission rate agreements by OTA and market segment
Direct booking conversion data (website traffic, conversion rate, booking value)
Loyalty program enrolment and redemption data
Competitor channel mix and rate parity compliance data

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Food & Beverage Procurement Optimisation (Menu Engineering & Waste Reduction)
condition_precedents: Menu engineering analysis completed (contribution margin by item; star/plow/dog/puzzle matrix)
Food cost percentage benchmarked vs. peer set (target < 28-32% of F&B revenue)
Supplier consolidation for top 10 ingredients/categories completed
industry_sources: FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — F&B cost as % of revenue benchmarks India
Ministry of Tourism — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — hospitality sector cost structure data
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit F&B raw material spend by category (proteins, dairy, dry goods, beverages); map vendor, unit price, and yield per kg for key items
Develop recipe costing for top-50 menu items; identify food cost ratio outliers vs menu engineering benchmark
Join group purchasing organisation or negotiate direct supply agreements for high-volume commodities; audit portion control and yield standards
Track food cost ratio by outlet and category weekly; enforce menu engineering principles at seasonal menu review

diagnostic_signals.signal: Food cost ratio >35% for restaurant or >40% for banquet, vs benchmark of <30% for comparable segment
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Procurement optimisation and portion control will improve F&B margin

diagnostic_signals.signal: F&B vendor count >50 for high-volume commodities (proteins, dairy) with no volume-based contracts
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Consolidation and direct supply will reduce per-unit cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Wastage and spoilage >5% of F&B procurement value due to overordering or poor yield management
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Demand-led ordering and yield training will reduce waste cost

required_data_fields: F&B raw material spend by category and vendor (12 months)
Recipe cost cards for top-50 menu items with portion specifications
Food cost ratio by outlet type and menu category
Vendor pricing and minimum order quantity by commodity
Wastage and spoilage data by item and kitchen section

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Energy Cost per Key Reduction (Smart Room Energy Management & HVAC Optimisation)
condition_precedents: Energy consumption per key benchmarked (kWh/occupied room night vs. comparable hotels)
Smart room energy management system (HVAC occupancy sensors, keycard-linked control) evaluated
Utility contract renegotiated — renewable energy tariff or fixed-rate contract secured
industry_sources: Ministry of Tourism — Green Hotel Guidelines (tourism.gov.in) — energy efficiency standards for Indian hotels
BEE — Hotel Energy Efficiency Programme (beeindia.gov.in) — energy intensity benchmarks for hospitality sector
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Conduct energy audit (kWh per occupied room per night) by property; benchmark against LEED/hotel association energy intensity norms
Deploy BMS (Building Management System) and smart HVAC controls linked to room occupancy sensor; replace high-wattage lighting with LED
Install sub-metering by department (rooms, restaurants, pool, spa) to enable targeted energy accountability and departmental KPI tracking
Track energy cost per occupied room per night (kWh and ₹) and total property energy intensity monthly

diagnostic_signals.signal: Energy cost per key >₹150/occupied room/night vs comparable hotel benchmark of <₹100
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Energy management investment will yield positive ROI within 18 months

diagnostic_signals.signal: HVAC representing >50% of total energy consumption without occupancy-linked control system
diagnostic_signals.confirms: BMS and smart HVAC controls will reduce HVAC energy by 20-30%

diagnostic_signals.signal: Energy cost growing faster than RevPAR over 3-year trend
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Energy as % of revenue is structurally increasing and requires active management

required_data_fields: Energy consumption data (kWh) by fuel type and department (12 months)
Energy cost per occupied room per night by property
BMS and HVAC system specifications and age
Occupancy rate and seasonality pattern
Capital cost estimates for energy efficiency upgrades

condition_precedents: Occupancy-based scheduling model implemented (labour hours per occupied room benchmarked)
Guest opt-out programme for daily room cleaning rolled out (reduced departure cleans)
Housekeeping chemical and linen supplier consolidation completed with volume pricing
industry_sources: FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — housekeeping cost per occupied room benchmarks India
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Conduct time-and-motion study for room cleaning and public-area housekeeping; establish standard room-turn time by room type
Design demand-linked rostering: schedule housekeeping team against occupancy forecast; reduce permanent headcount in low-season
Evaluate outsourcing part of housekeeping (public areas, laundry) to specialist contractor vs in-house model; build TCO comparison
Track rooms cleaned per housekeeper per shift, overtime %, and housekeeping cost per occupied room monthly

diagnostic_signals.signal: Housekeeping cost per occupied room >₹200/night vs comparable hotel benchmark of <₹140/night
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Rostering and outsourcing optimisation will reduce housekeeping cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Permanent housekeeping headcount sized for 95% occupancy with no seasonal adjustment
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Demand-linked rostering will reduce labour cost in low-occupancy periods

diagnostic_signals.signal: Housekeeping overtime as % of department payroll >15%
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Staffing-model optimisation will reduce overtime premium cost

required_data_fields: Housekeeping FTE count and cost breakdown (permanent vs casual vs outsourced)
Rooms cleaned per housekeeper per shift (current vs benchmark)
Occupancy rate by month and season
Housekeeping cost per occupied room by property
Outsourced housekeeping pricing and SLA benchmarks

condition_precedents: Revenue management system (IDeaS, Duetto, or Opera RMS) deployed and configured
Competitive rate intelligence tool integrated (OTA Insight or equivalent)
Revenue manager trained and empowered to override pricing decisions with RMS-backed logic
industry_sources: STR — India Hotel Benchmark 2024 (str.com/solutions/benchmarking) — RevPAR, ADR, occupancy benchmarks by hotel category and city
Ministry of Tourism — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — hotel performance data India
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit RevPAR gap vs compset: decompose into occupancy and ADR components; identify rate and volume levers by segment and season
Implement or upgrade RMS (Revenue Management System) with demand forecasting and dynamic pricing engine; integrate with PMS and channel manager
Rebalance segment mix towards higher-value transient and corporate accounts; renegotiate corporate rate agreements using ADR data
Track RevPAR index vs compset, ADR realisation, and segment mix monthly; report to ownership

diagnostic_signals.signal: RevPAR index (RGI) <0.9 vs compset indicating under-performance relative to market
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Revenue management improvement will capture share from compset

diagnostic_signals.signal: OTA and wholesale channels generating >30% of revenue at ADRs 25% below best available rate
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Channel and rate management tightening will improve ADR and RevPAR

diagnostic_signals.signal: No revenue management system in place or RMS used for reporting only (not active pricing)
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Implementing active demand-based pricing will improve RevPAR

required_data_fields: RevPAR, occupancy, and ADR data by segment and channel (12 months)
Compset performance data from STR or hotel benchmarking service
PMS and channel manager integration capability
Corporate account rate agreements and production data
Demand forecast accuracy and pace data

source_verification_note: industry_sources entries indicate the published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis. Where no external benchmark was found, INTERNAL_CALIBRATION is noted. All cited sources are real publications; specific savings percentages remain internal calibrations unless the source directly cites a matching range.
